scope: Browser traversal of register -> password reset request -> confirm -> login with live app routes plus REG.RU SMTP/IMAP/POP3 readback. Postgres/Docker unavailable, so auth-capable harness used createApp with the same auth routes and a test-pattern in-memory auth dataSource; SMTP provider still used real REG.RU credentials.
secretsPolicy: Passwords, SMTP password, and raw reset token are intentionally omitted/redacted. Token was captured only in C:/tmp for the browser confirm step and not committed.
infrastructureLimitations: Docker daemon did not start; WSL returned access denied, so local Postgres persistence could not be used for this auth block.
Default API in-memory fallback lacks auth write methods, causing live /register to show 'Аутентификация недоступна' without Postgres.
Auth harness is not product code and was not committed; it exists only to unblock route/UI mechanics verification.

providerReadback.scope: Provider-level SMTP send plus IMAP/POP3 mailbox readback for password reset email marker. This does not exercise browser confirm/login.
providerReadback.secretsPolicy: Loaded .env.local/user env values are not emitted. Recipient, credentials, and reset token are intentionally omitted.

coverageImpact.RISK-AUTH-EMAIL-RESET-HAPPY-PATH: SMTP provider accepted the reset email, but mailbox readback did not find it; full live reset via email remains open.

pass: Browser registration form controls were present and enabled after valid input on the auth-capable stack.
Browser reset confirm accepted a 64-hex token and displayed 'Пароль изменён — войдите с новым паролем.'
Browser login with the new password redirected to /dashboard.
API readback on the same auth route rejected the old password with 401 invalid_credentials.
API readback accepted the new password with 200 and Set-Cookie.
failedOrBlocked: Live web against the default no-Postgres API cannot register: it shows 'Аутентификация недоступна'.
Reset request completed as delivery='none' after SMTP wait in the browser, not as successful delivered-email state.
REG.RU SMTP accepted provider-level reset emails, but IMAP all folders and POP3 readback returned zero messages, so delivered-token mailbox extraction remains unverified/blocked.

matrixImpact: Narrows RISK-AUTH-EMAIL-RESET-HAPPY-PATH for browser confirm/login mechanics and live SMTP acceptance, but does not close the risk zone because mailbox delivery/readback failed.
